programs.name: Biorhythm
programs.description: Biorhythm calculator. Enter your birth date and a start date to plot your physical (23-day), emotional (28-day) and intellectual (33-day) cycles on screen.

programs.name: Bomber
programs.description: Bomber arcade game. Fly over a city and drop bombs to destroy buildings.

programs.name: Bul Pghya
programs.description: Bulls and Cows number guessing game (Hebrew: בול פגיעה = Direct Hit). The computer picks a secret 4 color code; you guess and are told how many colors are correct.

programs.name: Character Editor
programs.description: UDG (User Defined Graphics) character editor. Design custom 8×8 pixel characters using an on-screen grid.

programs.name: Decide
programs.description: Decision-making aid (Hebrew interface). Enter options and criteria, assign weights and scores, and the program calculates the best choice.

programs.name: Decode
programs.description: Code-breaking game similar to Mastermind. Guess the secret letter sequence and receive hints on correct positions.

programs.name: Dots
programs.description: Dots and Boxes grid game. Take turns drawing lines between dots; the player who completes the most boxes wins.

programs.name: Drawer
programs.description: Screen layout design tool. Define boundaries (lines and tabs) and draw content within them — used for designing screen templates.

programs.name: Duck
programs.description: Duck eating fish and trying to survive the fire. Make sure to eat the fish in order to have the strengh to fly. But do not stay for too long underwater since you must also breath.

programs.name: Exam
programs.description: Quiz and exam engine with Hebrew interface. Teacher mode to create quizzes; student mode to take them and receive a percentage grade.

programs.name: Frog
programs.description: Frogger-style game. Guide your frog across the screen while avoiding obstacles.

programs.name: Graph
programs.description: Graph plotting program. Plot the graph of a mathematical function on the ZX Spectrum screen. You need to input the function manually in the BASIC code in lines 200-999 before running the program. Then use RUN 9990 command to run the program.

programs.name: Groan
programs.description: Dice / probability game. Roll dice and accumulate scores — the first player to reach the target wins.

programs.name: Hangman
programs.description: Classic word guessing game. One player enters a secret word; the other guesses letters. The gallows fills up with each wrong guess.

programs.name: Hebrew (loader)
programs.description: Standalone Hebrew character set loader. Installs a custom Hebrew font into RAM for use by other programs.

programs.name: Hex Loader
programs.description: Interactive machine code hex editor. Browse memory by address and enter hex byte values — a developer tool for writing machine code directly on the Spectrum.

programs.name: High Score Module
programs.description: Reusable high score entry screen. Navigate a character picker to enter your name and store the top 10 scores.

programs.name: Horses
programs.description: Horse racing simulation. Ten horses race across the screen at random — watch and cheer for your favourite! To run the program, type R and then Enter.

programs.name: JOT
programs.description: Hebrew vocabulary flashcard trainer (version 1, 372 words). Shows a word and asks if you know the translation — builds vocabulary through spaced repetition.

programs.name: JOT II
programs.description: Hebrew vocabulary flashcard trainer (version 2, 426 words). An improved version of JOT with more words and refined interface.

programs.name: JOT III
programs.description: Hebrew vocabulary flashcard trainer (version 3, 443 words). The most polished version with the largest word list.

programs.name: Mazrek
programs.description: Syringe (Hebrew: מזרק). The goal of the game is to give a playful injection on the bum.

programs.name: MC Loader
programs.description: Machine code editor supporting both hex and decimal input. A developer tool for writing and editing machine code on the Spectrum.

programs.name: Microb
programs.description: You control a tooth microb that creates holes in teeth while avoiding the toothbrush.

programs.name: Microb II
programs.description: You control a tooth microb that tries to form as much plaque on the teeth as possible. The microb must catch and eat food remains in order to be able to form the plaque.

programs.name: Mines
programs.description: Minesweeper-style game. Navigate a grid and avoid the randomly placed mines.

programs.name: Obstacle
programs.description: Two-player obstacle course game. Both players navigate their pieces through obstacles using the keyboard.

programs.name: Packman
programs.description: Pac-Man clone. Navigate the maze eating dots while avoiding the ghost. Uses Kempston joystick — mapped to cursor keys.

programs.name: Pangolin
programs.description: Animal quiz game — you think of an animal and the computer tries to guess it by asking questions. You may also teach the computer about new animals.

programs.name: Pangolins
programs.description: Quiz game — two player version with 100 questions. Answer in Hebrew or English and compete for the highest score.

programs.name: Patpetani
programs.description: Hebrew conversational program (part 1). Enter your name and have a personalised interactive conversation in Hebrew.

programs.name: Patpetani 2
programs.description: Hebrew conversational program (part 2). A different script and topic from part 1.

programs.name: Patpetani 3
programs.description: Hebrew conversational program (part 3). A different script and topic from parts 1 and 2.

programs.name: Patpetani 4
programs.description: Hebrew conversational program (part 4). The final part of the Patpetani series.

programs.name: Piano
programs.description: Playable keyboard instrument. Press keys to play musical notes through the Spectrum's speaker.

programs.name: Professor
programs.description: Professor must save the world from exploding by finding the right combination of chemicals in the tubes.

programs.name: Raiders
programs.description: Space Invaders clone. Alien rows march across the screen — shoot them before they reach the bottom. Uses Kempston joystick — mapped to cursor keys.

programs.name: Road Race
programs.description: Scrolling road racing game. Keep your car on the road as it narrows and speeds up.

programs.name: Scrolling Numbers Backwards
programs.description: Animated digit-scroll demonstration. Counts down from 99 to 0 with a smooth per-digit rolling animation using custom characters.

programs.name: Scrolling Numbers Forward
programs.description: Animated digit-scroll demonstration. Counts up from 0 to 99 with a smooth per-digit rolling animation using custom characters.

programs.name: Simon
programs.description: Simon Says memory game. The computer shows a growing sequence of coloured pads — repeat it back correctly.

programs.name: Soccer
programs.description: Two-player soccer game. Each player controls a bat — score goals against your opponent. To start the game, press one of the movement keys of the corresponding player.

programs.name: Statistics
programs.description: Statistics calculator with Hebrew interface. Enter data sets and calculate mean, standard deviation, and frequency distributions.

programs.name: Swimmer
programs.description: Swimmer must jump into water and swim to land while avoiding the shark.

programs.name: Tsolelot
programs.description: Submarines — a Battleship-style game (Hebrew: צוללות). Take turns guessing coordinates on a 10×10 grid to find the hidden submarine.

programs.name: UFO
programs.description: UFO arcade game. Fly over a city and drop bombs to destroy buildings. Uses machine code for fast action.

programs.name: Wari
programs.description: Wari (Awari / Mancala) — the classic African board game. Play against the computer at two difficulty levels.

programs.name: Word Games
programs.description: Word games collection — bilingual Hebrew/English. Multiple word-based challenges using built-in word lists.

programs.name: Wumpus
programs.description: Hunt the Wumpus — classic text adventure. Navigate a 20-room cave, avoid bats and pits, and slay the Wumpus with your arrows. Fully bilingual Hebrew/English.

programs.name: Air Raid
programs.description: Air raid arcade game (work in progress). Machine code game with custom graphics. Uses Kempston joystick — mapped to cursor keys.

programs.name: Alchemy
programs.description: Alchemy game (work in progress). A machine code game.

programs.name: Clock
programs.description: Digital clock display. Runs entirely in machine code for smooth animation.

programs.name: English Past Tense
programs.description: English past tense teaching tool — bilingual Hebrew/English. Quizzes on irregular verb past tense forms and tracks your score.

programs.name: JOT II (dev)
programs.description: Hebrew vocabulary flashcard trainer — development copy of JOT II (426 words).

programs.name: Microb III
programs.description: Microb game (version 3, work in progress). The most advanced version — almost entirely in machine code. Uses Kempston joystick — mapped to cursor keys.

programs.name: Microb III (module)
programs.description: Auxiliary module for Microb III. Uses Kempston joystick — mapped to cursor keys.

programs.name: Zayad
programs.description: Hunter game prototype (Hebrew: צייד). Aim and fire a gun in the forest.
